content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — Description claims "built-in ad blocker", "AI-powered suggestions", and "works fully offline", but ContentView.swift (App/ContentView.swift:1-19) is the only Swift source and shows just a plain in-memory List/TextField task list with no ad-blocking, no ML/CoreML/CreateML imports, and no offline persistence or networking logic.

Pierre: Apple's reviewers routinely test marketing claims against actual app behavior, and unsubstantiated claims like "AI-powered" or "ad blocker" are a common cause of 2.1/2.3 rejections for misleading metadata. Here the entire codebase is a simple to-do list with no AI, ad-blocking, or offline-sync implementation to back these claims. Either implement the described features or rewrite description.txt to match what TaskTide actually does.
